node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"անզգամու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104252595","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104252595","n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-121b"},"n":"անզգամութի"},"M691":{"lit":"անզգա<lb xml:id=\"l104013995\" facs=\"#z104013995\" n=\"24\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>մու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104013994","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104013994","n":"23"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"691-147a"},"n":"անզգամութի"},"M695":{"lit":"ան<lb xml:id=\"l103928152\" facs=\"#z103928152\" n=\"12\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>զգամու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z103928151","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103928151","n":"11"},"column":{"n":"3"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"695-373b"},"n":"անզգամութի"},"M6712":{"lit":"անզգամու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104399370","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104399370","n":"5"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-147b"},"n":"անզգամութի"}}
